'''Danny Craven''' (born 21 November 1991) is a [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|so|sh}} or {{rlp|fb}} for the [[Midlands Hurricanes]].

==Background==
Craven was born in [[St Helens, Merseyside]], England.{{fact|date=February 2020}}

==Career==
===Widnes Vikings===
He made his début against [[Whitehaven RLFC]] in 2010.<ref>{{cite news|url=http://www.runcornandwidnesweeklynews.co.uk/widnes-vikings/widnes-vikings-news/2012/05/17/craven-success-at-the-top-spurs-danny-at-widnes-vikings-55368-30982141|title=Craven success at the top spurs Danny at Widnes Vikings|date=17 May 2012|newspaper=Runcorn and Widnes Weekly News|accessdate= 2 April 2013}}</ref>
Rejoined Widnes for the 2021 season.

===Oldham RLFC===
On 13 October 2023 it was reported that he had signed for [[Oldham RLFC]] for the 2024 season on a permanent 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=13 Oct 2023|title=Widnes stalwart Danny Craven's next destination confirmed following Vikings departure; 'I needed a new environment'|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/widnes-stalwart-danny-cravens-next-destination-confirmed-following-vikings-departure-i-needed-a-new-environment}}</ref>

===Sheffield Eagles===
On 11 July 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Sheffield Eagles]] in the [[RFL Championship]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=11 Jul 2025|author=Louis Chapman Coombe|title=Former Super League duo in Championship swap move ahead of unique fixture|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/former-super-league-duo-in-championship-swap-move-ahead-of-unique-fixture}}</ref>

===Midlands Hurricanes===
On 26 September 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[Midlands Hurricanes]] in the [[RFL League 1]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=26 Sep 2025|author=Stephen Ibbetson|title=Midlands Hurricanes seal deal for ex-Super League halfback|url=https://www.totalrl.com/midlands-hurricanes-seal-deal-for-ex-super-league-halfback/}}</ref>
